title: Ask a Philosopher
description: Ask philosophical questions and get thoughtful, concise responses.
insight: People ask better questions when the UI lowers friction and gives one clear prompt box.

title: NBA Spread Betting Tracker
description: Tracking model predictions on NBA spreads.
insight: Separating model confidence from pick direction made the dashboard easier to trust at a glance.

title: CodeX Build Notes
description: A running public log of experiments, architecture choices, and shipping lessons.
insight: Short weekly summaries help keep momentum and make future refactors much easier.
